Scroll up to choose the multipack (increases the quantity decreases unit price)
description: Protect your precious items during shipping with PAIF Padded Mailing Envelopes. Made with an inner layer of bubble wrap that provides excellent protection against bumps and vibrations during transport. The self-sealing system ensures a secure and fast seal without the need for additional tape. Sturdy gold kraft paper outer construction ensures discretion and durability. Perfect for e-commerce, online sellers, offices and personal use, these padded envelopes are the professional solution for your mailing. The combination of practicality and protection makes these PAIF envelopes the reliable choice for safely sending documents and valuables.
